session.assistant:
## Report: `make fast-ci` Results
The command failed with exit code 2. Here's a summary of the issues found:
### Prettier (Format Check) - **Status**: FAILED - **Issue**: 1 file needs reformatting - **File**: `tests/unit/core/test_health_checks_plans_repo_labels.py` - **Details**: Code style issues found in 3 files (including markdown docs)
### Ruff (Lint) - **Status**: FAILED - **Issues**: 2 errors found - **File**: `tests/unit/core/test_health_checks_plans_repo_labels.py` - **Line 34**: E501 Line too long (104 > 100 characters) - **Line 119**: E501 Line too long (104 > 100 characters)
### Exec Reference Check - **Status**: FAILED - **Issue**: `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is out of date - **Fix**: Run `erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs` to regenerate
### Type Checking (ty) - **Status**: PASSED - All checks passed
### Unit Tests (erk) - **Status**: FAILED - **Results**: 43 failed, 5941 passed, 2 warnings in 25.65s - **Failed Tests**: 43 test failures primarily in: - `tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot_*.py` - Label assertion failures (expecting `('erk-pr', 'erk-plan')` but getting `('erk-pr', 'erk-plan', 'erk-core')`) - `tests/commands/pr/test_list.py` - Multiple failures with "No plans found matching the criteria" messages - `tests/commands/test_dash_workflow_runs.py` - 7 test failures with similar "No plans found" issues - `tests/unit/core/test_health_checks_plans_repo_labels.py` - Related to plan repo label checks
### Unit Tests (erk-dev) - **Status**: PASSED - 136 passed in 5.80s
### Unit Tests (erk-statusline) - **Status**: PASSED - 115 passed in 0.85s
### Unit Tests (erk-mcp) - **Status**: PASSED - 31 tests (output truncated)
